title: Benefits of BV-AVD (Brentuximab vedotin, doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine) versus ABVD (doxorubicin hydrochloride, bleomycin sulfate, vinblastine sulfate, dacarbazine) in patients with advanced-stage Hodgkin's lymphoma: an analysis of the ECHELON 1 trial by the GATLA group using the Delphi Method.
abstract: The BV-AVD (Brentuximab vedotin, doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine) combination for first-line treatment of advanced stage Hodgkin's lymphoma has been approved by regulatory authorities and included in international guidelines. However, several factors influence its incorporation as standard of care.
